failures.description: The agent failed to include all qualifying items from the ProductCatalogSearch result. It listed 4293355847, 6956751343, and 8176740019, but omitted 5312063289 even though its price was greater than $194.56.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify all available bamboo-deck Skateboards costing more than $194.56. The tool output at index 3 contained all required evidence. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer from that output but omitted item_id 5312063289, whose price is 195.15 and therefore satisfies the condition. This reflects partial/incorrect use of the tool output rather than an invalid tool call or misunderstood user intent.
